subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! From the letter received it became evident that, praise be to God, the fame of the Blessed Cause hath reached the Caucasus [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان از مکتوب مرسول مفهوم شد که الحمد لله آوازه امر مبارک قفقاز را
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
